headline: EXCLUSIVE: From Nvidia Earnings To Fed Decisions, Kalshi Sees Prediction Markets Going Mainstream
summary: Kalshi says prediction markets are evolving into mainstream Wall Street: spanning Nvidia earnings, Fed decisions, AI regulation etc.

headline: Why Robinhood (HOOD) Stock May Stand To Lose From Congress's Prediction Market Bill Frenzy
summary: Rep. Ritchie Torres is introducing yet another prediction market bill, but Robinhood's $147M event contract business likely survives.
